modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst in response to an email and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be distracting grammar usage and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Teams login error after recent password change

full_description_text:  
So, the user changed their password. Now, when they try to log into Teams, they get this error message. It says something like "An error occurred." They’re not sure what to do next. Just a heads up, they might need some help with this.
short_description: Teams login error after recent password change
description: So, the user changed their password. Now, when they try to log into Teams, they get this error message. It says something like "An error occurred." They’re not sure what to do next. Just a heads up, they might need some help with this.
